description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the epcallan/phpunit-php7 Docker image and runs composer install in a global before_script. Define a single stage named test and add a job called tests that runs in the test stage on Linux runners (tagged linux). The tests job caches the vendor/ directory, executes the command phpunit -c tests --coverage-text --colors=never, and is configured to run only on the master branch while excluding tag pipelines. No artifacts or services are defined.
